title: Job Opening Category Manager at The Man Company Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at The Man Company Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with The Man Company Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About The Man Company Digital Technologies:
The Man Company Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Man Company Digital Technologies!
